nodes.name: realtime.js
nodes.summary: Implements the server-sent events (SSE) hub for real-time UI updates: holds the connected-client set, broadcasts data_change events, and listens on a dedicated PostgreSQL connection for LISTEN/NOTIFY 'data_change' messages to auto-regenerate QR codes and push updates to clients.

nodes.name: system-update.routes.js
nodes.summary: Express router exposing admin endpoints to check git/deploy status, trigger a self-update (git pull + restart) job, and roll back to the latest backup tag/DB dump by shelling out to git and spawning background update scripts.

nodes.name: server.js
nodes.summary: Main application entry point: configures Express middleware (CORS, JSON, HTTPS redirect, static assets), implements custom cookie-based JWT-like auth (sign/verify token, role guards), mounts the API and system-update routers, starts HTTP/HTTPS listeners, wires systemd watchdog notify, and handles graceful shutdown of servers, DB pool, and realtime connections.

nodes.name: qr.js
nodes.summary: Utility module that generates labeled SVG QR codes for employees, production lines, and workstations, writing them to disk under the configured qrcodes directory and updating each entity's qr_code_path/qr_generated_at columns in the database.

nodes.name: handleEvents
nodes.summary: Express request handler that upgrades a connection to an SSE stream, registers the response object in the in-memory clients set, and deregisters it when the client disconnects.

nodes.name: broadcast
nodes.summary: Serializes an event name and payload to JSON and writes it as an SSE message to every currently connected client.

nodes.name: closeAllConnections
nodes.summary: Ends every open SSE response, clears the clients set, and closes the dedicated PostgreSQL LISTEN connection during graceful shutdown.

nodes.name: startDbListener
nodes.summary: Opens a dedicated pg Client, issues LISTEN data_change, and on each notification parses the payload, regenerates QR codes for newly inserted employees/lines/processes/operations, and broadcasts the change to SSE clients.
nodes.languageNotes: Calls qr.generateProcessQrById and qr.generateOperationQrById, which are not present among qr.js's exported functions — a likely latent bug where the QR auto-regeneration silently throws on INSERT of product_processes/operations.

nodes.name: getRepoValue
nodes.summary: Runs a git command synchronously in the project root and returns its trimmed stdout, swallowing errors as null.

nodes.name: resolveRollbackTarget
nodes.summary: Determines the git tag and database backup path to roll back to, validating that no update job is currently running and that a previous backup exists before allowing a rollback.

nodes.name: spawnJob
nodes.summary: Spawns a detached background Node script (update or rollback) by job id and unrefs the child process so it survives the parent request lifecycle.

nodes.name: verifyToken
nodes.summary: Validates a custom signed token's HMAC-SHA256 signature against AUTH_SECRET and checks its expiry, returning the decoded payload or null.

nodes.name: buildAuthCookie
nodes.summary: Builds the Set-Cookie header value for the auth token, applying HttpOnly/SameSite/Secure flags based on whether the request was made over HTTPS.

nodes.name: setupSystemdNotify
nodes.summary: Sends READY=1 to systemd via sd_notify on startup and schedules periodic WATCHDOG=1 pings at half the configured watchdog interval, enabling systemd service supervision.

nodes.name: gracefulShutdown
nodes.summary: Handles SIGTERM/SIGINT by closing the HTTP and HTTPS servers, ending the PostgreSQL pool, closing all realtime SSE connections, and force-exiting the process if shutdown does not complete within a timeout.

nodes.name: writeQrWithLabel
nodes.summary: Renders a QR code to SVG via the qrcode library, then post-processes the SVG to append one or two text labels beneath the code before writing the final file to disk.

nodes.name: generateEmployeeQrById
nodes.summary: Loads an employee by id, generates a labeled QR (employee code + name) under the employees QR directory, and updates the employee's qr_code_path and qr_generated_at columns.

nodes.name: generateLineQrById
nodes.summary: Loads a production line by id, generates a labeled QR (line code + name) under the lines QR directory, and updates the line's qr_code_path and qr_generated_at columns.

nodes.name: generateWorkstationQrForLine
nodes.summary: Generates a labeled QR code for every workstation belonging to a given production line, writing each SVG file and collecting the results to return to the caller.
